subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: GOD has created all things wisely and with a purpose. For everything He has ordered a heaven and a hell; its heaven is its place of high degree
subcodes.subjects: @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @education and the development of capacity, @Manifestation of God as educator, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @need for an educator
